data.name: Account.SignInHint
data.value: We'll send a magic link by email — your picks will sync to the cloud.

data.name: Home.Description
data.value: Call powerlifting results without odds, slips or noise.

data.name: Home.CompetitionsHint
data.value: Choose a meet and start predicting.

data.name: CompetitionTimeline.RosterBodySingle
data.value: This athlete is no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: CompetitionTimeline.RosterBodyMultiple
data.value: These athletes are no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.OpenAffected
data.value: Open competition updates. {0} withdrawn athlete(s) affect your picks.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.Subtitle
data.value: Roster, deadline, and results in event order

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.RosterBodySingle
data.value: This athlete is no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.RosterBodyMultiple
data.value: These athletes are no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.Pinned.Editable
data.value: Your picks include withdrawn athlete(s): {0}. Update before the deadline; unchanged withdrawn slots score 0 points.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.Pinned.Locked
data.value: Picks are locked. Withdrawn athlete(s) in your picks ({0}) score 0 points; editing is no longer available.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.Empty.Body
data.value: Important roster, deadline, and result updates will appear here when they happen.

data.name: CompetitionUpdates.Privacy
data.value: Updates are public event-level entries. Warnings about your picks are private to you; we do not expose other users' picks, emails, or drafts.

data.name: Competition.NotFoundDescription
data.value: No JSON configuration exists for this competition.

data.name: Competition.ModulesHint
data.value: Choose the module you want to fill first.

data.name: Competition.FeaturedAthletesHint
data.value: Selected athletes from current competition setup.

data.name: Predictions.NotFoundDescription
data.value: No JSON configuration exists for this competition.

data.name: Predictions.Description
data.value: Your answers are saved locally and, after sign-in, to your private cloud save.

data.name: Predictions.Locked
data.value: Prediction editing is locked for this competition.

data.name: Predictions.DraftSaved
data.value: Draft saved locally. Fix validation issues before final review.

data.name: Predictions.LocalNotice
data.value: Beta build: picks are saved locally and privately synchronized to the cloud after sign-in.

data.name: Predictions.LocalBrowserOnly
data.value: Picks are saved locally and, after sign-in, to the cloud

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ErrorDetail
data.value: Check your connection and try again

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmDescription
data.value: You are submitting your picks for this competition. This is not gambling: no stakes, odds or money.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmParticipants
data.value: Your display name and submission time may appear in standings.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmAnswersPrivate
data.value: Full answers are not public at this stage; others will not see your picks or email.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmDraftsPrivate
data.value: Drafts remain private until you submit them.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmAutoUpdate
data.value: After submitting, you can keep editing until the deadline; later changes update the submitted entry automatically.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ConfirmFutureLock
data.value: After the deadline, picks will be locked.

data.name: Predictions.Toast.Submit.Success
data.value: Picks submitted. Changes will update the entry until the deadline.

data.name: Share.Subtitle
data.value: Quickly check completeness before copying or exporting.

data.name: Share.NoPicksHint
data.value: You don't have any saved picks yet. Export will unlock after your first selection.

data.name: Share.PrivacyNote
data.value: Your picks are always stored locally. After sign-in, the private draft also synchronizes to the cloud.

data.name: Share.Card.CopySummary.Body
data.value: Readable text for Discord, messages or podcast notes.

data.name: Share.Card.ExportJson.Body
data.value: Full data for backup, import or to send to an organiser.

data.name: Share.Card.ExportCsv.Body
data.value: Table for analysis & comparison — opens in Excel, Numbers and Sheets. (CSV, not XLSX.)

data.name: Share.Card.CopyLink.Body
data.value: A link to TotalCall without your picks — your picks stay in your browser.

data.name: Share.Toast.Generic.Error
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Predictions.Toast.AutoFill.Empty
data.value: No athletes available for auto-fill in this category.

data.name: Predictions.Toast.SortPredicted.Empty
data.value: Add picks with predicted totals before sorting by PRED.

data.name: Predictions.Toast.Save.Error
data.value: Could not save the local draft.

data.name: Share.Clipboard.FallbackBody
data.value: The browser blocked automatic copy. Select the text below and copy it manually (Cmd/Ctrl + C).

data.name: Predictions.NoModulesDescription
data.value: This competition has no configured prediction modules.

data.name: Predictions.CategoryContextHint
data.value: Click an athlete in the ranking to view her details and start history.

data.name: Predictions.CategoryContextHintMale
data.value: Click an athlete in the ranking to view his details and start history.

data.name: FloatingWindow.HistoryActionsLabel
data.value: Quick actions for the edited athlete

data.name: FloatingWindow.NoSlotContextHint
data.value: Open the predicted total editor for this athlete to apply values with one click.

data.name: Predictions.Profile.VerdictHigh
data.value: Nomination very likely to be met

data.name: Predictions.AnalyticsPartial
data.value: Some metrics are unavailable for this athlete.

data.name: Predictions.AnalyticsLimitedSample
data.value: Limited history — treat these stats cautiously.

data.name: Predictions.Analytics.NoRecent12M
data.value: No result in the last 12 months

data.name: Predictions.SourceAttribution
data.value: Data from the OpenIPF / OpenPowerlifting project, https://www.openpowerlifting.org.

data.name: Predictions.Compare.SelectionHint
data.value: Select 2-3 athletes in the grid · selected {0}

data.name: Predictions.Compare.MaxThree
data.value: You can compare up to 3 athletes at once.

data.name: Predictions.Compare.NoCommonStarts
data.value: No common starts in the data.

data.name: Predictions.Compare.VerdictLead
data.value: {0} leads in {1} of {2} available metrics. This is an analytical view — change the order manually in the sheet if form or attempt risk tells a different story.

data.name: Predictions.Compare.VerdictNoData
data.value: There is not enough history yet, so treat this matrix as a quick look at nominations and your projections.

data.name: Predictions.Compare.ReadOnly
data.value: Comparison does not count as a pick

data.name: Predictions.ContextPanelInsight
data.value: The context panel helps compare athlete form before ranking picks.

data.name: Predictions.SaveAnyTime
data.value: You can save at any time. Only completed predictions will score.

data.name: Predictions.UnsupportedModuleDescription
data.value: Module type "{0}" is not implemented yet.

data.name: Predictions.ModuleNotImplemented
data.value: This prediction module is configured but not implemented yet.

data.name: Predictions.NoCategoriesDescription
data.value: This module does not have configured categories.

data.name: Predictions.TopNHeaderHintFemale
data.value: Top {0} women by total — drag to change order

data.name: Predictions.TopNHeaderHintMale
data.value: Top {0} men by total — drag to change order

data.name: Predictions.TopNHeaderHint
data.value: Top {0} athletes by total — drag to change order

data.name: Predictions.PredictionEditorSubtitle
data.value: Optional helper for arranging the ranking.

data.name: Predictions.PredictionValueInvalid
data.value: Enter a positive, realistic number or leave the field empty.

data.name: Predictions.NoAthleteHistoryInline
data.value: No history is available for this athlete. You can still enter a total manually.

data.name: Predictions.DragOrPickHint
data.value: Drag or pick from the list

data.name: Predictions.CompleteSectionToScore
data.value: Complete this category to score points.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.PickWarningEditable
data.value: You selected a withdrawn athlete. Update this pick before the deadline.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.PickWarningLocked
data.value: This pick is locked. Withdrawn athletes score 0 points.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.Banner.AffectedTitle
data.value: Your picks include a withdrawn athlete.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.Banner.AffectedLocked
data.value: {0}: picks are locked; withdrawn athletes score 0 points.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.Banner.NeutralSingle
data.value: This athlete is no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.Banner.NeutralMultiple
data.value: {0} are no longer selectable for new picks.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.SubmitWarningBody
data.value: Selected withdrawn athlete(s): {0}. You can still submit, but those slots score 0 if left unchanged.

data.name: Predictions.Roster.Rules
data.value: If an athlete withdraws before the deadline, you can update your picks until predictions lock. If a withdrawn athlete remains in your submitted picks, that athlete scores 0 points. Picks are not automatically shifted or replaced.

data.name: Review.NotFoundDescription
data.value: No JSON configuration exists for this competition.

data.name: Review.Description
data.value: These answers are read from local browser storage.

data.name: Review.EmptyDescription
data.value: Start the prediction form to create a local draft.

data.name: Review.ValidationIssues
data.value: This draft still has {0} validation issue(s).

data.name: Review.Modules.Description
data.value: Check each module before copying or exporting your picks.

data.name: Review.Module.NoSections
data.value: This module has no review sections.

data.name: Review.Section.NotStarted
data.value: This section has not been started.

data.name: Review.Notice.AllComplete
data.value: All required picks are filled in. You can copy or export the summary.

data.name: Review.Notice.IncompleteHint
data.value: Incomplete picks may not be scored.

data.name: Validation.MaxValue
data.value: Value must be no more than {value}.

data.name: Validation.DuplicateAthletes
data.value: The same athlete cannot be selected more than once.

data.name: Data.Competition.worlds-2026.Description
data.value: Podium picks for every configured weight class.

data.name: Data.Group.sheffield-2026.records.Description
data.value: Predict how close lifters get to world record standards.

data.name: Data.Group.worlds-2026.quick-mode.Description
data.value: A short set of picks for people who do not want to fill every category.

data.name: Data.Group.worlds-2026.category-picks.Description
data.value: Move category by category and fill podiums without a long scroll.

data.name: Data.Question.sheffield-2026.top-overall.Description
data.value: Rank the top five overall lifters.

data.name: Data.Question.sheffield-2026.wr-percentage.Description
data.value: Choose the lifter and predict their percentage of the relevant world record.

data.name: Data.Question.sheffield-2026.record-breakers.Description
data.value: Select any lifters you expect to break a world record.

data.name: Data.Question.sheffield-2026.any-wr.Title
data.value: Will any world record be broken?

data.name: Data.Question.sheffield-2026.highest-total.Description
data.value: Predict the highest total in kilograms.

data.name: Data.Question.worlds-2026.best-lifter.Description
data.value: Pick the overall best lifter of the meet.

data.name: Data.Question.worlds-2026.total-world-records.Title
data.value: How many world records will fall?

data.name: Data.Question.worlds-2026.most-medals-country.Title
data.value: Which country wins the most medals?

data.name: Data.Question.worlds-2026.any-perfect-day.Title
data.value: Will any lifter go 9/9 and win gold?

data.name: Privacy.LocalStorage.Body
data.value: Picks, app preferences and - after sign-in - session data are stored in this browser's localStorage. Clearing browser data removes the local draft, preferences and session, but does not delete the account or cloud save.

data.name: Privacy.AccountCloud.Body
data.value: Magic Link sign-in uses your email address in Supabase Auth. While signed in, a complete snapshot of your picks is synchronized to Supabase and tied to your user ID. Signed-out users save picks locally only.

data.name: Privacy.AccountCloud.Provider
data.value: Authentication and private save provider: Supabase.

data.name: Privacy.Visibility.Body
data.value: Cloud picks are not public and are not used in a leaderboard. RLS policies allow a signed-in user to create, read and update only their own data. Signing out does not delete local picks or Cloud Save; the current version does not yet provide self-service account or cloud-data deletion.

data.name: Privacy.Export.Body
data.value: JSON/CSV exports and copied summaries are generated locally in the browser. TotalCall does not upload exports automatically; after you share a file or text yourself, its further use is controlled by the recipient.

data.name: Privacy.AthleteData.Body
data.value: Athlete history and analytics are public sports data fetched from Supabase and based on OpenIPF and OpenPowerlifting. They are not connected to your account or private picks.

data.name: Privacy.Analytics.Body
data.value: Visit statistics measure app page views. TotalCall does not send your email address, pick content, selected athletes, session data or localStorage contents to analytics.

data.name: Privacy.Analytics.Provider
data.value: Visit statistics: Cloudflare Web Analytics, no cookies.

data.name: Privacy.Beta.Body
data.value: This is a beta version of the app. Features, data formats and synchronization rules may change, so keeping your own export before major updates is still recommended.

data.name: Privacy.Footer.Short
data.value: Local save plus private Cloud Save after sign-in. Picks are not public.

data.name: Predictions.TopN.ModuleMenuNote
data.value: Switching modules rebuilds the whole screen for a different prediction type — your picks in each module are saved separately.

data.name: Predictions.TopN.CutoffHint
data.value: below = comparison zone · drag or use the arrows to change place

data.name: Predictions.TopN.CompareSoon
data.value: Open athlete comparison around the podium cutoff.

data.name: Predictions.TopN.CompareNotEnough
data.value: You need at least two athletes to compare.

data.name: Predictions.TopN.FillManualNote
data.value: You can also type manually in the SQ/BP/DL fields ↑

data.name: Predictions.Deadline.ArchiveHint
data.value: Picks are in archive mode — compare them with competition results when available.

data.name: Predictions.Submit.ArchivedDetail
data.value: Archived picks · results available after the competition

data.name: Predictions.Toast.ResetField.Success
data.value: Restored the field to nomination order.

data.name: Participants.PrivacyNote
data.value: The list shows submitted entries only. Full answers, emails and account identifiers are hidden. This is not a scored leaderboard yet; order is neutral by submission time. Points and ranking will appear after results.

data.name: Participants.Empty.Title
data.value: No one has submitted picks yet

data.name: Participants.Empty.Description
data.value: Be the first person on the list. Fill the prediction sheet, then submit from the action bar.

data.name: Participants.Error.Description
data.value: There was a connection problem. Your submitted picks are safe; this only affects the participants preview.

data.name: Standings.Subtitle
data.value: Submissions, live scoring and final ranking

data.name: Standings.PrivacyNote
data.value: Public data includes only display name, position, points, progress and calculation time. Picks, email and account ID stay private.

data.name: Standings.Empty.Description
data.value: Standings will show submitted picks. Drafts stay private and never appear here.

data.name: Standings.Error.Description
data.value: There was a connection problem. Private picks are not fetched or exposed on this page.

data.name: Standings.Banner.Submissions.Description
data.value: Only submitted entries are shown for now. Points will appear after the first final groups are imported.

data.name: Standings.Banner.Live.Description
data.value: {0} of {1} required groups have been scored. Pending groups do not count as zero.

data.name: Standings.Banner.Final.Description
data.value: All {0} required groups have been scored.

data.name: Standings.PreFootnote
data.value: Before results are imported, standings do not show points or zeroes for unscored groups.

data.name: Standings.LiveFootnote
data.value: The ranking is built from backend score snapshots. Pending groups are skipped until their final result is available.

data.name: Standings.FinalFootnote
data.value: Final standings use prepared score snapshots without public access to other users' picks.

data.name: Auth.Login.Subtitle
data.value: We'll email you a magic link — no password needed.

data.name: Auth.Login.SentBody
data.value: We sent a sign-in link to {0}. Open it to finish signing in.

data.name: Auth.Login.Error
data.value: We couldn't send the link. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.Login.Hint
data.value: The link is valid for a short time and works only once.

data.name: Profile.Description
data.value: Set the public nickname for TotalCall entries.

data.name: Profile.DisplayNameHint
data.value: Maximum 32 characters: letters, numbers, spaces, dot, hyphen and underscore.

data.name: Profile.VisibilityCopy
data.value: This nickname will be visible in public standings.

data.name: Profile.SaveError
data.value: Could not save profile. Please try again.

data.name: Profile.DisplayNameTooLong
data.value: Nickname can be at most 32 characters.

data.name: Profile.DisplayNameInvalid
data.value: Nickname can contain only letters, numbers, spaces, dot, hyphen and underscore.

data.name: Auth.Callback.ErrorBody
data.value: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
